rationale.R1.3: The agent provides a detailed critique of the original text, identifying specific issues and suggesting improvements. It also offers a revised version that addresses these concerns.
rationale.R1.7: The agent engages with the citations by highlighting potential gaps in the methodology and providing suggestions for improvement.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly identifies several key issues with the original text and suggests revisions, indicating high confidence in its assessment of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the requested active set without any drift or omissions.
rationale.RX.4: The revised text does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it addresses potential issues with the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides a detailed critique and suggests revisions that are well-traced to the original text.
